title: Save a card for future payments
description: Use Checkout in setup mode to collect payment details and charge customers later.

steps.title: Create a new customer
steps.description: Create a customer to attach the saved payment method to.

nodes.title: Create a new customer
nodes.description: Create a customer to attach the saved payment method to.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

steps.title: Create a Checkout Session
steps.description: Create a Checkout Session in setup mode to collect payment details.

nodes.title: Create a Checkout Session
nodes.description: Create a Checkout Session with mode=setup to save a payment method.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Complete the checkout
nodes.description: Redirect the customer to Checkout so they can save their payment method.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Handle checkout.session.completed
nodes.description: Listen for the checkout.session.completed event to confirm the setup flow completed.
nodes.review_prompt: Run `stripe trigger checkout.session.completed` and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.

steps.title: Charge the payment method later
steps.description: Create a PaymentIntent using the saved payment method.

nodes.title: Retrieve the SetupIntent
nodes.description: Retrieve the SetupIntent from the completed Checkout Session to find the saved payment method.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Charge the payment method later
nodes.description: Charge the customer using their saved payment method.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Handle payment_intent.succeeded
nodes.description: Listen for the payment_intent.succeeded event to confirm the off-session payment succeeded.
nodes.review_prompt: Run `stripe trigger payment_intent.succeeded` and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.
